projects.projectName: Herries Range Wind Farm and Transmission Line
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision packages are ongoing/imminent.
projects.summary: Major construction has commenced for the 1GW Herries Range Wind Farm, which includes a dedicated 380km HV transmission line and new substations to connect to the grid. This project involves significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Construction well underway as of early 2024, targeting late 2025 completion — reneweconomy.com.au (2024), powerlink.com.au (2024)

projects.epcContractor: ACEREZ (ACCIONA, GE Energy Financial Services consortium)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - procurement for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for transmission lines and substations is ongoing as construction ramps up.
projects.summary: EnergyCo NSW's New England REZ Network Infrastructure project involves 345km of new 330kV transmission lines and substations to enable renewable energy connection. The Infrastructure Delivery Partner has been awarded, early works commenced, and significant HV equipment procurement, including transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS, is ongoing for 2025.
projects.statusNote: Infrastructure Delivery Partner (ACEREZ) awarded August 2023, early works commenced, main construction commencing mid-2024 — energyco.nsw.gov.au (2024)

projects.projectName: Bundangla Solar and BESS Project Stage 3
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for BESS and associated HV equipment (transformers, switchgear) is expected to commence for this expansion.
projects.summary: Enel Green Power Australia is planning Stage 3 of the Bundangla Solar project, which includes a large-scale Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). The project is in the planning phase, targeting FID late 2024/early 2025, with procurement for BESS components and potential substation upgrades (including HV transformers and switchgear) anticipated in late 2025.
projects.statusNote: Stage 3 expansion in planning, targeting FID late 2024/early 2025 — RenewEconomy (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - FID targeted late 2025, followed by procurement for major equipment and grid connection infrastructure including HV components.
projects.summary: A significant green hydrogen production facility planned for the Hunter Valley, NSW, has received CEFC funding and is in the FEED phase. The project will require substantial power infrastructure, including new grid connections, substations, HV transformers, and switchgear, with major procurement expected from early 2026.
projects.statusNote: FEED studies ongoing, targeting FID in 2025 — origenenergy.com.au (2024)

projects.epcContractor: CPA Group (Consolidated Power Projects and Acciona JV)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision packages for transmission lines and substation components are ongoing/imminent as construction progresses.
projects.summary: The Western Renewables Link, a critical 500kV transmission line in Victoria, is moving into construction. Major contracts have been awarded, with specialist procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and other substation equipment ongoing for this vital grid upgrade.
projects.statusNote: Early construction works underway, major construction ramp up in H2 2024 — aemo.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for dedicated substation, HV grid connection, transformers, and switchgear for this large data centre project is imminent.
projects.summary: A new hyperscale data centre is planned for Western Sydney, requiring a dedicated new substation and HV grid connection infrastructure to support its multi-hundred MW power demand. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment is expected to commence in Q3 2025.
projects.statusNote: Part of Microsoft's ongoing Sydney region cloud expansion, new facilities planned for Western Sydney — datacenterdynamics.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - as detailed design progresses, procurement for major HV transmission infrastructure and substation components (transformers, switchgear) will open.
projects.summary: The Central-West Orana REZ requires significant new HV transmission lines and substations. Planning is advanced with ARENA support, and major procurement for HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear, is anticipated from late 2025 as the project moves towards construction.
projects.statusNote: In planning and approvals phase, preferred network solution identified, construction forecast 2026 — energyco.nsw.gov.au (2024)

projects.projectName: MacIntyre Wind Farm Stage 2 / BESS Expansion
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - potential expansion will involve new HV infrastructure procurement for grid connection and substation upgrades.
projects.summary: While the first stage of MacIntyre Wind Farm is nearing completion, ACCIONA Energia is considering a second stage or a significant BESS expansion. This would entail new HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear, for grid connection and substation upgrades, with procurement anticipated from mid-2026 if it proceeds.
projects.statusNote: ACCIONA Energia exploring options for Stage 2, no firm FID or construction timeline confirmed — reneweconomy.com.au (2023)

projects.epcContractor: Acciona Energy (for BESS), Network contractors for transmission
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for ongoing transmission network upgrades and substation works.
projects.summary: The Waratah Super Battery project involves extensive network upgrades by Transgrid, including new and upgraded HV transmission lines and substations, beyond the main BESS installation (Acciona Energy). Procurement for specialist HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) and associated QAQC and FAT services is ongoing for these crucial grid infrastructure elements.
projects.statusNote: BESS construction commenced Q4 2023, network upgrades by Transgrid underway — energyco.nsw.gov.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for main EPC and HV equipment for the dedicated substation (transformers, switchgear) expected to open.
projects.summary: Lightsource bp is developing a 300MW solar farm with a 150MW BESS in Bundaberg, Queensland. The project has secured grid connection and is preparing for major procurement in H1 2025, including HV transformers and switchgear for its dedicated substation.
projects.statusNote: Project in development, preparing for FID and major procurement — pv-magazine-australia.com (2023), lightsourcebp.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - as Stage 2 progresses, procurement for turbines and associated HV equipment for grid connection is expected.
projects.summary: Following its first stage, Golden Plains Wind Farm in Victoria is planning a 400MW Stage 2 expansion. This will involve procurement for turbines and potentially further substation upgrades or new HV equipment for grid connections, with major procurement anticipated from early 2026.
projects.statusNote: Stage 2 under development, planning permits being reviewed — TagEnergy (2023), planning.vic.gov.au (2024)

projects.projectName: Equinix Perth Hyperscale Data Centre (New Build)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision for new hyperscale data center construction, targeting Q2 2025 opening.
projects.summary: Equinix is building a new hyperscale data centre (PE3) in Perth, expected to open in Q2 2025. This project requires a new dedicated substation and 132kV grid connection, with procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment having commenced in late 2024 to support its imminent operation.
projects.statusNote: New PE3 hyperscale data center under construction, expected to open Q2 2025 — equinix.com (2023)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision for BESS and grid connection substation construction, targeting H2 2025 operation.
projects.summary: The 250MW/500MWh Munmorah BESS project on the NSW Central Coast, backed by CEFC, awarded its EPC contract to Fluence in Q3 2023 and commenced early works in Q4 2023. Procurement for major equipment, including HV transformers and switchgear for the grid connection substation, is ongoing, targeting H2 2025 operation.
projects.statusNote: EPC awarded to Fluence Q3 2023, early works commenced Q4 2023, targeted operational H2 2025 — akayshaenergy.com.au (2024)

projects.epcContractor: UGL-CPB Contractors JV (for CopperString 2032 major works), various contractors for other SuperGrid components
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate and ongoing - multiple packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for transmission lines, substations, transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS are open or will be released for various phases of the Queensland SuperGrid.
projects.summary: The Queensland SuperGrid, including projects like CopperString 2032, represents a continuous pipeline of HV transmission and substation infrastructure. Construction of CopperString 2032 commenced in Q4 2023. Ongoing procurement and specialist sub-packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS are active or imminent across various phases to connect new REZs.
projects.statusNote: CopperString 2032 construction commenced Q4 2023, early works and procurement ongoing for SuperGrid components — powerlink.com.au (2023)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 - if project reaches FID, significant procurement for HV transmission and substation equipment (transformers, switchgear) will be required.
projects.summary: Hydro Tasmania's Taralearh Pumped Hydro expansion project is in feasibility, with ARENA support. If it proceeds, it will necessitate substantial HV transmission upgrades and new substations for grid connection, involving HV transformers and switchgear, with procurement anticipated from late 2026.
projects.statusNote: Project remains in feasibility and design phase, no FID announced — hydro.com.au (2024)

projects.projectName: Sydney Data Centre Power Upgrade Program
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing substation upgrades and HV equipment procurement for expanding data centre capacity, including FAT and QAQC for transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is undertaking a multi-phase power upgrade program for its Sydney data centres, involving new and upgraded substations and HV grid connections. This requires significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear, with ongoing procurement for specialist packages as construction progresses.
projects.statusNote: Part of AWS's A$13 billion investment into Australian cloud region, implying ongoing data center and power infrastructure construction/upgrades — datacenterdynamics.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Kidston Pumped Hydro and Transmission Link
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for ongoing transmission line and substation construction.
projects.summary: The Kidston Pumped Hydro project is under construction and 75% complete, on track for energisation in Q2 2025, including a new 275kV transmission line and associated substations. While major EPC is underway, specialist sub-packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear for the grid connection infrastructure are still open or require ongoing QAQC/FAT services.
projects.statusNote: KPHES 75% complete, on track for energisation Q2 2025 — genexpower.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - expansion plans will require new generation assets and associated grid connection infrastructure, including HV substation equipment.
projects.summary: Iberdrola Australia is planning an expansion of its Port Augusta Renewable Energy Hub, which may include additional solar, wind, and BESS capacity. This will involve further substation upgrades and procurement for HV transformers and switchgear, with major procurement anticipated from Q3 2025.
projects.statusNote: Expansion plans currently being assessed, in early planning stages — iberdrola.com.au (2023)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - major tenders for HVDC converter stations, subsea cables, and associated HV equipment (transformers, switchgear, GIS) are active or planned for H1 2024.
projects.summary: The Marinus Link HVDC interconnector project is progressing with tenders active or planned for major packages, including HVDC converter stations, which require substantial HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and other specialized equipment. Construction is expected to commence after contract awards, with procurement for these components expected to open from H1 2024 onwards.
projects.statusNote: Tenders for major works packages (HVDC converter stations, cables, HV equipment) active or planned for H1 2024 — marinuslink.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - FID expected H2 2024, followed by tenders for electrolysers, renewables, and major HV power infrastructure.
projects.summary: South Australia's flagship green hydrogen production facility at Blyth, powered by co-located renewables, is progressing into detailed design and engineering, with FID expected in H2 2024. Procurement for the entire energy complex, including extensive HV power infrastructure, new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for grid connection, is anticipated to commence in Q1 2025.
projects.statusNote: In detailed design and engineering phase, FID expected H2 2024 — energy.sa.gov.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate and ongoing - specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for transmission lines, substations, transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS are active and ongoing.
projects.summary: Project EnergyConnect, a 330kV interconnector between NSW and SA, is well underway. While major construction is active, specialist procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and ongoing QAQC/FAT services for substation and transmission line components remain open or imminent.
projects.statusNote: Construction well underway in both NSW and SA sections, expected completion 2026 — transgrid.com.au (2024)

projects.projectName: Port of Newcastle Green Hydrogen Hub
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - as feasibility progresses, procurement for electrolyser technology and substantial grid connection infrastructure, including HV equipment, will open.
projects.summary: The Port of Newcastle is developing a green hydrogen hub, supported by ARENA. This large-scale project will require significant new electrical infrastructure, including high-capacity grid connections, substations, HV transformers, and switchgear, with procurement anticipated from early 2026.
projects.statusNote: Feasibility studies ongoing, no FID announced — portofnewcastle.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for significant transmission network upgrades and new substations required to connect Snowy 2.0 and other generation to the grid.
projects.summary: While Snowy 2.0 main works are advanced, extensive associated transmission network upgrades by Transgrid are ongoing and critical, forming part of the broader Future Grid program. These include new 330kV transmission lines and substations, requiring continuous procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and specialized FAT/QAQC services to connect Snowy 2.0 and other generation to the grid.
projects.statusNote: Associated transmission network upgrades (e.g. HumeLink, Project EnergyConnect) are well underway and critical for Snowy 2.0 connection — transgrid.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - preliminary tenders for design and early works, followed by major HV equipment procurement for transmission lines and substations.
projects.summary: EnergyCo NSW is developing the South West REZ, which will require significant new HV transmission infrastructure and substations to connect renewable energy projects. Major procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear is anticipated from Q3 2026.
projects.statusNote: In planning and approvals phase, construction expected to commence 2027 — energyco.nsw.gov.au (2024)

projects.projectName: Neoen Goyder South Renewable Energy Hub (Stage 3)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - procurement for further wind, solar, and BESS components, along with associated HV grid connection equipment and substation expansion.
projects.summary: Neoen is planning Stage 3 of its Goyder South Renewable Energy Hub, an integrated wind, solar, and BESS project. This expansion will require new generation assets, potentially new transmission lines, and significant upgrades to substations, including HV transformers and switchgear, with procurement expected from early 2026.
projects.statusNote: Stage 3 is a future expansion, currently in early planning stages — neoen.com (2023)

projects.projectName: NextDC Perth P2 Data Centre Expansion (Phase 2)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - target NextDC now for early engagement on HV power infrastructure design and procurement for dedicated substation expansion, HV transformers, and switchgear for Phase 2.
projects.summary: NextDC is planning Phase 2 of its hyperscale P2 data centre in Perth, necessitating a significant expansion of high-voltage substation and grid connection infrastructure. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment for this expansion is expected to commence in Q2 2025.
projects.statusNote: P2 Perth Phase 2 in development — nextdc.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - detailed design and procurement for major HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) for new substations and transmission lines are commencing now.
projects.summary: ANEEL's latest transmission auction awarded Lot 1, encompassing 300km of 500kV transmission lines and new substations in Minas Gerais. The project has been awarded to Neoenergia Transmissão (March 2024), with design and procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS for the new substations and lines commencing immediately for a 60-month execution.
projects.statusNote: Awarded to Neoenergia Transmissão in March 2024, 60-month execution period commenced — aneel.gov.br (2024), neoenergia.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - EPC tender and procurement for HV transformers and switchgear for the dedicated substation are expected to commence in Q1 2025.
projects.summary: The 500MW Gigante Solar PV Project in Bahia has secured its environmental license and is moving towards FID. It includes a dedicated substation and grid connection, requiring HV transformers and switchgear. Major procurement is expected to begin in Q1 2025.
projects.statusNote: Environmental license secured, FID expected 2024/2025 — absolar.org.br (2024), edpr.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - procurement for wind turbines and associated HV equipment for substation expansion and grid connection is expected following FID.
projects.summary: A 300MW expansion of a wind farm cluster in Ceará is in feasibility studies, targeting FID in early 2026. The project will require new grid connections and substation upgrades, including HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Expansion under evaluation, no firm FID announced — enelgreenpower.com/brasil (2023)

projects.projectName: São Paulo Hyperscale Data Centre (New Build)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for the dedicated substation, HV grid connection, transformers, and switchgear for this large data centre project is imminent.
projects.summary: A new hyperscale data centre is planned for São Paulo, necessitating a new dedicated substation and 138kV grid connection due to its substantial power requirements. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment is expected to commence in Q2 2025.
projects.statusNote: Part of Digital Realty's ongoing São Paulo expansion, new capacity in planning — digitalrealty.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Northeast Brazil Green Hydrogen & Offshore Wind Integration
projects.location: Northeast Brazil (e.g., Ceará, Rio Grande do Norte)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - as feasibility studies for these strategic hydrogen hubs develop, early engagement with potential consortia regarding HV infrastructure planning will be beneficial.
projects.summary: EPE is highlighting large-scale green hydrogen projects in Northeast Brazil, potentially powered by offshore wind. These are very early-stage concepts without firm developers but will require extensive HV transmission infrastructure, substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for grid integration, with procurement far out, around 2027.
projects.statusNote: Conceptual projects outlined in EPE's 10-year plan, no firm developer or FID announced — epe.gov.br (2023)

projects.location: Various regions (e.g., Minas Gerais, Bahia, Piauí)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - target potential concessionaires now as they prepare for the auction. Procurement for HV equipment will follow concession awards from H2 2025.
projects.summary: ANEEL's planned 2025 transmission auction (01/2025) will award concessions for multiple large-scale HV transmission lines and new substations. These projects will involve significant procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and switchgear, with tenders for these components expected to open from H2 2025 after the auction.
projects.statusNote: Auction 01/2025 planned for Q1 2025 as per ANEEL calendar — aneel.gov.br (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - procurement for this strategic HVDC link, including converter station transformers, switchgear, and associated AC substations, is expected to follow the ANEEL tender process.
projects.summary: A major North-South HVDC interconnection project, outlined in EPE's long-term energy plan, is targeting tender in Q2 2026. This extensive project will involve converter stations, new substations, HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and significant HV transmission infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Long-term strategic project outlined in EPE's 10-year plan, in early planning stages — epe.gov.br (2023)

projects.projectName: Ceará Solar PV Park (Atlas Renewable Energy)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for main EPC and HV equipment for the dedicated substation (transformers, switchgear) is expected to open.
projects.summary: Atlas Renewable Energy is developing a 400MW solar PV park in Ceará, nearing final permits. Procurement for major equipment, including HV transformers and switchgear for the dedicated grid connection substation, is anticipated to start in Q3 2025.
projects.statusNote: New PV park in Ceará under development/permitting — atlasrenewableenergy.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Ascenty Rio de Janeiro Data Centre
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 / H1 2025 - procurement for the dedicated 230kV substation, HV grid connection, transformers, and switchgear for this data centre project is imminent, as construction could start late 2024.
projects.summary: Ascenty is planning a new large-scale data centre in Rio de Janeiro, necessitating a new 230kV substation and grid connection. Construction could start in late 2024, with procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment for this significant power infrastructure expected to commence in Q3 2025.
projects.statusNote: New data centers planned for Brazil including Rio, construction could start 2024-2025 for some sites — ascenty.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - main EPC tender and procurement for wind turbines, as well as HV equipment for the dedicated substation (transformers, switchgear), are expected to open.
projects.summary: Neoenergia Renováveis is developing a 350MW wind farm cluster in Paraíba. The project is in advanced stages, with procurement for wind turbines and HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear for the dedicated grid connection substation, anticipated to start in Q3 2025.
projects.statusNote: Ongoing wind development in Paraíba, permits advancing for new phases — neoenergia.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Minas Gerais Green Hydrogen Production Facility
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 - initial tenders for electrolysers and the complex's power infrastructure, including HV transformers and switchgear, are expected.
projects.summary: A large-scale green hydrogen production facility is being planned in Minas Gerais by Vale, potentially leveraging local solar resources. The project is currently in feasibility studies and will require significant electrical infrastructure, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for grid connection, with procurement projected for late 2026.
projects.statusNote: Vale conducting feasibility studies for green hydrogen production in Minas Gerais — vale.com (2023)

projects.projectName: Santa Catarina Offshore Wind Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - early engagement with developers and regulatory bodies as detailed studies for offshore wind transmission infrastructure, including HVDC and onshore substations, commence.
projects.summary: Brazil's EPE is evaluating offshore wind potential in Santa Catarina, which will necessitate significant HV transmission infrastructure, potentially including HVDC converter stations, new substations, HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS for grid connection, with procurement anticipated around 2027.
projects.statusNote: Conceptual projects outlined in EPE's studies, no specific project or FID announced — epe.gov.br (2023)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - EPC tender expected soon, covering both solar and BESS components, along with HV equipment for the dedicated substation.
projects.summary: A large-scale 300MW solar PV and BESS complex is planned for Teresina, Piauí. The project is moving towards major procurement in Q2 2025, which will include HV transformers and switchgear for the dedicated grid connection substation.
projects.statusNote: Project in advanced stages, moving towards major procurement — absolar.org.br (2023)

projects.projectName: São Paulo Hyperscale Colocation Data Centre (Phase 2)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for additional substation capacity, HV grid connections, transformers, and switchgear for the expanding data centre campus.
projects.summary: Scala Data Centers is planning Phase 2 of a hyperscale colocation data centre campus in São Paulo. This expansion requires new substations, HV grid connections, and significant procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear, with tenders expected in Q3 2025.
projects.statusNote: Phase 2 modules planned as part of ongoing São Paulo campus expansion — scaladatacenters.com (2023)

projects.location: Snowy Mountains to Sydney / Wollongong, NSW
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for ongoing transmission line and substation construction.
projects.summary: HumeLink is a critical 500kV transmission project integral to the NSW SuperGrid, connecting the Snowy Mountains to the network. Major construction contracts were awarded in late 2023 to ACCIONA and SecureEnergy, and construction commenced in late 2023 / early 2024. This project involves extensive HV transmission lines, new and upgraded substations, HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS, with ongoing procurement and specialist services required.
projects.statusNote: Major construction contracts awarded late 2023, construction commenced Q1 2024 — transgrid.com.au (2024)

projects.projectName: EnergyConnect East (NSW portion of Project EnergyConnect)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for transmission line and substation construction.
projects.summary: EnergyConnect East is the NSW section of Project EnergyConnect, building 330kV transmission lines and substations to connect to the new REZ. Early works and procurement for specialist HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) are ongoing as construction ramps up, targeting completion by 2026.
projects.statusNote: Construction well underway, targeting 2026 completion — transgrid.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - FEED studies ongoing, procurement for electrolysers and associated HV infrastructure anticipated.
projects.summary: Santos is progressing feasibility and FEED studies for a large-scale green hydrogen production facility in Narrabri, powered by renewables. The project will require significant new electrical infrastructure, including new substations and grid connections, involving HV transformers and switchgear, with major procurement expected from late 2025.
projects.statusNote: Feasibility and FEED studies ongoing, target FID 2025 — santos.com (2023)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for ongoing substation construction and grid connection.
projects.summary: The Kurri Kurri gas-fired power station, designed to be hydrogen-ready, is under construction. An EPC contract was awarded to GE and McConnell Dowell, and major civil works are advancing. The project requires a new 330kV substation and grid connection, involving significant HV transformers and switchgear, with specialist procurement ongoing.
projects.statusNote: EPC awarded to GE and McConnell Dowell in 2022, construction well underway, targeting operation mid-2024 — energyaustralia.com.au (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 - detailed design and procurement for electrolysers, renewable power generation, and significant HV grid infrastructure will commence post-FID.
projects.summary: Fortescue Future Industries is developing a large-scale green hydrogen and ammonia production facility at Port Hedland, powered by co-located renewables. This mega-project will require extensive new HV transmission infrastructure, multiple substations, HV transformers, and switchgear, with FID and major procurement anticipated from late 2026.
projects.statusNote: FFI progressing feasibility studies and securing land for future phases — ffi.com.au (2023)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision for wind farm and associated substation/transmission connection.
projects.summary: The Kaban Green Power Hub, comprising a 157MW wind farm and a 100MW BESS, is under construction in North Queensland. UGL was awarded the EPC contract, and the project includes extensive 275kV transmission line works and a new substation. Procurement for specialist HV equipment like transformers and switchgear for the grid connection is ongoing.
projects.statusNote: Construction ongoing, wind farm and BESS expected operational H1 2024 — neoen.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - as detailed planning progresses, procurement for major HV transmission infrastructure and substations will commence.
projects.summary: Western Power is planning significant new HV transmission infrastructure to connect the Northern Goldfields REZ. This involves new 330kV transmission lines and substations, requiring substantial procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS, with tenders anticipated from early 2026.
projects.statusNote: Part of WA's Future Energy Zones plan, in early planning with network route identification — dplh.wa.gov.au (2023)

projects.projectName: Vena Energy Wandoan South Solar and BESS Project
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - FID expected mid-2025, followed by EPC tender and procurement for HV equipment for the new grid connection and substation.
projects.summary: Vena Energy's Wandoan South project, a large-scale solar farm with integrated BESS, is progressing towards FID in mid-2025. The project includes a dedicated substation and HV grid connection, necessitating procurement for HV transformers and switchgear, with major tenders expected in H2 2025.
projects.statusNote: Project received development approval, targeting FID mid-2025 — venaenergy.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - detailed design and approvals for transmission reinforcement, followed by procurement for HV equipment.
projects.summary: AEMO's 2024 ISP highlights the Western Victoria REZ Transmission Reinforcement project as critical for connecting new renewables. This project involves substantial HV transmission line upgrades and new substations, requiring procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS, with tenders anticipated from late 2025.
projects.statusNote: Included in AEMO's 2024 Draft ISP as committed network infrastructure, regulatory approvals ongoing — aemo.com.au (2024)

projects.projectName: Sun Cable Australia-Asia PowerLink (Northern Territory components)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - after project restructuring, FID for NT components anticipated, followed by procurement for generation, BESS, and HVDC converter stations.
projects.summary: Sun Cable's Australia-Asia PowerLink project aims to develop massive solar and BESS capacity in the NT, connected to Darwin and Singapore via HVDC. Following financial restructuring, the project is advancing through approvals. The NT components will require significant HVDC converter stations, new substations, HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and extensive HV transmission infrastructure, with major procurement expected from early 2026.
projects.statusNote: Project under new ownership (Grok Ventures, Squadron Energy), progressing through approvals, FID for NT components expected post-restructuring — suncable.sg (2024)

projects.projectName: Port Kembla Energy Terminal (Gas & Hydrogen Infrastructure)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist procurement and QAQC surveillance for electrical infrastructure connecting FSRU and gas pipeline to the grid.
projects.summary: Squadron Energy's Port Kembla Energy Terminal, an FSRU for gas imports, is under construction, with first gas expected in H2 2024. This project involves significant associated electrical infrastructure, including new grid connections and substation upgrades for power supply, and potential future hydrogen integration. Procurement for HV components like transformers and switchgear is ongoing for these connections.
projects.statusNote: FSRU arrived Dec 2023, infrastructure construction ongoing, first gas expected H2 2024 — squadronenergy.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for BESS grid connection and substation components.
projects.summary: The Kidston Battery (K-BESS) project, co-located with the pumped hydro, is under construction. Tesla was awarded the BESS supply, and UGL handles the balance of plant. It integrates with existing/new substation infrastructure. Procurement for specialized HV transformers and switchgear for the BESS grid connection is ongoing, with energization expected Q2 2024.
projects.statusNote: BESS supply by Tesla, BoP by UGL, energisation expected Q2 2024 — genexpower.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - as detailed planning progresses, procurement for electrolysers, renewable power and grid connection infrastructure will commence.
projects.summary: Ark Energy (Korea Zinc) is developing a green hydrogen hub at the Port of Bundaberg, powered by local renewables. The project is in feasibility/FEED stages and will require significant new electrical infrastructure, including new substations and HV grid connections, with major procurement anticipated from mid-2026.
projects.statusNote: Feasibility studies ongoing, land secured, FID expected mid-2025 — arkenergy.com.au (2023)

projects.projectName: Clarke Creek Wind and Solar Farm
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision for wind/solar farm and grid connection infrastructure.
projects.summary: Squadron Energy's Clarke Creek Wind and Solar Farm is under construction in Queensland. The project includes extensive grid connection infrastructure, a new 330kV substation, and HV transmission lines. Procurement for specialized HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear is ongoing for this large-scale hybrid renewable energy project.
projects.statusNote: Wind farm construction commenced 2022, solar farm and BESS phases advancing, targeting full operation by 2026 — squadronenergy.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Port of Townsville Green Hydrogen Hub
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 - after FID, procurement for electrolysers and grid connection infrastructure, including HV components, will open.
projects.summary: Ark Energy and Stanwell are developing a green hydrogen hub at the Port of Townsville, leveraging local industrial demand. The project is in feasibility studies and will require new electrical infrastructure, including new substations and HV grid connections, with major procurement anticipated from late 2026.
projects.statusNote: Feasibility studies completed, progressing towards FID — arkenergy.com.au (2023)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision for wind turbines and grid connection substation components.
projects.summary: Golden Plains Wind Farm Stage 1 (1000MW) is under construction, with Goldwind Australia as the EPC. It includes a dedicated substation and grid connection infrastructure. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear for the grid connection is ongoing, with significant activity throughout 2024.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced 2023, turbines being installed, targeting operation late 2025 — tagenergy.com (2024)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - FID expected mid-2025, followed by EPC tender and procurement for turbines and HV equipment for grid connection.
projects.summary: Neoen's Mount Hopeful Wind Farm is progressing through development approvals in Queensland, targeting FID mid-2025. The project includes a new substation and HV grid connection infrastructure, necessitating procurement for HV transformers and switchgear, with major tenders anticipated in H2 2025.
projects.statusNote: Development approval granted, targeting FID mid-2025 — neoen.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Western Downs Green Power Hub (BESS Expansion)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - FID for BESS expansion expected H1 2025, followed by EPC tender and procurement for HV equipment.
projects.summary: Neoen is planning a significant BESS expansion at its operational Western Downs Green Power Hub. This expansion will require new HV equipment for grid connection and substation upgrades, including transformers and switchgear. FID is expected in H1 2025, with major procurement to follow.
projects.statusNote: BESS expansion in advanced planning, targeting FID H1 2025 — neoen.com (2024)

projects.projectName: Port Augusta Hydrogen Hub (Fortescue Future Industries)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - as feasibility progresses, procurement for electrolysers, renewables and grid connection infrastructure including HV components will open.
projects.summary: Fortescue Future Industries (FFI) is developing a large-scale green hydrogen production facility at Port Augusta, leveraging the region's renewable energy potential. The project is in feasibility studies and will require significant new electrical infrastructure, including new substations and HV grid connections, with major procurement anticipated from early 2026.
projects.statusNote: Feasibility studies ongoing in partnership with SA government — ffi.com.au (2023)

projects.projectName: Eastern Victoria REZ Transmission Reinforcement (Gippsland VNI West alternative)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 - detailed design and approvals for transmission reinforcement, followed by procurement for HV equipment.
projects.summary: AEMO's 2024 ISP identifies a need for significant transmission reinforcement in Eastern Victoria to connect the Gippsland REZ and support grid stability. This project, potentially an alternative or complement to VNI West, involves substantial HV transmission line upgrades and new substations, requiring procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS, with tenders anticipated from late 2026.
projects.statusNote: Included in AEMO's 2024 Draft ISP as identified network infrastructure, in early stages of development — aemo.com.au (2024)

projects.projectName: Casa Nova IV Solar PV Project
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - FID expected mid-2025, followed by EPC tender and procurement for HV equipment.
projects.summary: Lightsource bp is developing the Casa Nova IV solar PV project in Bahia, with FID targeted for mid-2025. The project requires a new dedicated substation and grid connection, involving procurement for HV transformers and switchgear, with major tenders expected in H2 2025.
projects.statusNote: Project in advanced development, environmental license secured, FID expected mid-2025 — absolar.org.br (2024)
